TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: a i pinaljavakan nua lamtaw king aicu a lizuk a lamtaw. pasakaledep a viri tua lamtaw king. kinaizuanan a sihu nua tayuansing kasicuayan. penuljat ta sasupuan nua pasalavan a kadjunangan a lizuk a lamtaw izua qadjaw a 71.6 km¬≤. kadjunangan cinalivatan pinapungadan kemasi tua qinaljan nua searikun aicu a pinapungadan a lamtaw nuaya. kasangasangasan a tja mapacunan tua siaya a lamtaw a i tua vavecikan nua tayuanhu nu i kacaviljan a 1695. sipacacikelan neka nu ljaljevavavan tua kisiya imaza i lamtaw lizuk. palidring a djalan palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasantjelulj a palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasantjelulj sa A a palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasansimuluq sa sepatj-B a palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasansimuluq sa sepatj-D a palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasan 76 a palidring a djalan palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasan 139 a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasan 150 a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka ita a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka tjelu a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka lima a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka unem a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka alu a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasanmusapuluq a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasanmusapuluq saka ita a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw === basu ===
S.PHON: a i pina éavakan nua …≠amtaw kiŇč ai ¶u a …≠izuk a …≠amtaw. pasaka…≠…ôd…ôp a viri tua …≠amtaw kiŇč. kinaizuanan a sihu nua tajuansiŇč kasi ¶uajan. p…ônu éat ta sasupuan nua pasa…≠avan a ka…ČunaŇčan a …≠izuk a …≠amtaw izua qa…Čaw a **.* km*. ka…ČunaŇčan ¶ina…≠ivatan pinapuŇčadan k…ômasi tua qina éan nua s…ôarikun ai ¶u a pinapuŇčadan a …≠amtaw nuaja. kasaŇčasaŇčasan a ¶a mapa ¶unan tua siaja a …≠amtaw a i tua vav…ô ¶ikan nua tajuanhu nu i ka ¶avi éan a ****. sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an n…ôka nu éa é…ôvavavan tua kisija imaza i …≠amtaw …≠izuk. pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é sa a a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasansimu…≠uq sa s…ôpa ¶-b a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasansimu…≠uq sa s…ôpa ¶-d a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka ita a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka ¶…ô…≠u a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka …≠ima a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka un…ôm a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka a…≠u a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasanmusapu…≠uq a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasanmusapu…≠uq saka ita a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw === basu ===
S.FORM: a i pinaljavakan nua lamtaw king aicu a lizuk a lamtaw. pasakaledep a viri tua lamtaw king. kinaizuanan a sihu nua tayuansing kasicuayan. penuljat ta sasupuan nua pasalavan a kadjunangan a lizuk a lamtaw izua qadjaw a 71.6 km¬≤. kadjunangan cinalivatan pinapungadan kemasi tua qinaljan nua searikun aicu a pinapungadan a lamtaw nuaya. kasangasangasan a tja mapacunan tua siaya a lamtaw a i tua vavecikan nua tayuanhu nu i kacaviljan a 1695. sipacacikelan neka nu ljaljevavavan tua kisiya imaza i lamtaw lizuk. palidring a djalan palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasantjelulj a palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasantjelulj sa A a palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasansimuluq sa sepatj-B a palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasansimuluq sa sepatj-D a palidring a djalan nua tayuan sikamasan 76 a palidring a djalan palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasan 139 a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasan 150 a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka ita a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka tjelu a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka lima a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka unem a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka alu a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasanmusapuluq a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw sikamasanmusapuluq saka ita a palidring a djalan nua lamtaw === basu ===
S.PHON: a i pina éavakan nua …≠amtaw kiŇč ai ¶u a …≠izuk a …≠amtaw. pasaka…≠…ôd…ôp a viri tua …≠amtaw kiŇč. kinaizuanan a sihu nua tajuansiŇč kasi ¶uajan. p…ônu éat ta sasupuan nua pasa…≠avan a ka…ČunaŇčan a …≠izuk a …≠amtaw izua qa…Čaw a **.* km*. ka…ČunaŇčan ¶ina…≠ivatan pinapuŇčadan k…ômasi tua qina éan nua s…ôarikun ai ¶u a pinapuŇčadan a …≠amtaw nuaja. kasaŇčasaŇčasan a ¶a mapa ¶unan tua siaja a …≠amtaw a i tua vav…ô ¶ikan nua tajuanhu nu i ka ¶avi éan a ****. sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an n…ôka nu éa é…ôvavavan tua kisija imaza i …≠amtaw …≠izuk. pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é sa a a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasansimu…≠uq sa s…ôpa ¶-b a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasansimu…≠uq sa s…ôpa ¶-d a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka ita a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka ¶…ô…≠u a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka …≠ima a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka un…ôm a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka a…≠u a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasanmusapu…≠uq a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw sikamasanmusapu…≠uq saka ita a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua …≠amtaw === basu ===
